title: Croatian Pasta Bake
description: A hearty casserole combining rich flavors of Croatian cuisine with pasta and cheese. Perfect for a satisfying dinner.

ingredients.name: Rich meat sauce (see below for recipe)
Grated cheese (Cheddar or Parmesan work well)

instructions: Cook the penne pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the rich meat sauce and stir to combine.
Add the cooked penne pasta to the skillet and toss with the sauce.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with grated cheese.
Sprinkle the Croatian paprika and chopped parsley over the cheese.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake for 15-20 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
